title: T 61b Publish Workflow Hardening
summary: Move id-token scope to publish job only, add protected release environment, add npm Dependabot coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Start from the controlling plan docs/exec-plans/active/61-t-wave-8-repo-security-and-supply-chain-hardening.md before broader repo exploration.
Keep the scope anchored to the requested files: .github/workflows/publish.yml, .github/dependabot.yml.
Run the first validation command: python scripts\run_actionlint.py.
Deliver the expected outcome: Move id-token scope to publish job only, add protected release environment, add npm Dependabot coverage..
